symptoms.symptom_name: Chalk-white depigmented macules with normal texture

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Chalk-white depigmented macules with normal texture are characteristic of vitiligo.

symptoms.symptom_name: No scale/active border/necrosis; no chemical exposure

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of scale/active border argues strongly against a fungal cause; intact painless skin argues against necrosis.

symptoms.symptom_name: Painless, non-itchy, afebrile; blanching self-induced erythema

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Painless, afebrile, blanching (not fixed) erythema argues strongly against necrosis/infection.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Routine GP/dermatology review (natural history, topical calcineurin inhibitors/phototherapy, camouflage)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Discuss options and confirm diagnosis; not urgent.
Not indicated — there is no scale/active border to suggest tinea/pityriasis versicolor.
